nodes.name: Message.java
nodes.summary: Kafka message envelope carrying source, event, URI, timestamp, and payload metadata.

nodes.name: Message
nodes.summary: Envelope model for Kafka event metadata and payload content.

nodes.name: StockYearData.java
nodes.summary: Financial data model for annual stock metrics, valuation fields, cash-flow values, and ratio calculations.

nodes.name: StockYearData
nodes.summary: Annual financial metric model used by upload parsing and validation.

nodes.name: KafkaProducer.java
nodes.summary: Higher-level producer facade that initializes Kafka publishing and sends ingestion messages with service URI metadata.

nodes.name: KafkaProducer
nodes.summary: Producer facade that publishes ingestion messages through KafkaService.

nodes.name: init
nodes.summary: Initializes Kafka producer or request-response infrastructure after dependency injection.

nodes.name: publish
nodes.summary: Publishes stock-year ingestion messages through KafkaService.

nodes.name: StagedUpload.java
nodes.summary: Record that stores staged upload metadata, original filename, parsed records, and validation result before confirmation.

nodes.name: StockYearDataValidationRecord.java
nodes.summary: Record pairing a parsed stock-year data row with its source sheet and row location for validation reporting.

nodes.name: UploadValidationIssue.java
nodes.summary: Record describing a validation issue field and message for upload errors or warnings.

nodes.name: StockYearDataUploadService.java
nodes.summary: Coordinates the complete stock-year upload workflow: file checks, workbook parsing, history lookup, validation, Redis staging, and Kafka publishing.

nodes.name: StockYearDataUploadService
nodes.summary: Central service orchestrating stock-year data upload parsing, validation, staging, and publish confirmation.

nodes.name: uploadStockData
nodes.summary: Accepts an uploaded spreadsheet and delegates validation and staging to the upload service.

nodes.name: confirmUpload
nodes.summary: Confirms a staged upload and triggers publishing of the parsed records.

nodes.name: parseStockData
nodes.summary: Parses workbook or sheet contents into stock-year validation records.

nodes.name: fetchHistoryRecords
nodes.summary: Fetches historical stock-year records and merges lookup failures into the validation result.

nodes.name: buildHistoryRequests
nodes.summary: Builds unique stock-year history lookup requests from parsed upload records.

nodes.name: stageUpload
nodes.summary: Stores parsed upload data and validation result in Redis with a generated upload ID.

nodes.name: publishRecords
nodes.summary: Publishes confirmed upload records to Kafka for downstream ingestion.

nodes.name: setMetricValue
nodes.summary: Maps spreadsheet metric names to StockYearData financial fields.

nodes.name: getCellBigDecimalValue
nodes.summary: Converts spreadsheet cells into BigDecimal values when possible.

nodes.name: getCellNumericValue
nodes.summary: Extracts numeric values from numeric or formula spreadsheet cells.

nodes.name: BusinessValidation.java
nodes.summary: Applies business rules to stock-year records, including required fields, metric ranges, and year-over-year change warnings.

nodes.name: BusinessValidation
nodes.summary: Business validation component for finance metric sanity checks and historical comparisons.

nodes.name: validate
nodes.summary: Runs validation rules for the file, workbook, or business data represented by the method parameters.

nodes.name: buildHistoryMap
nodes.summary: Indexes historical stock-year responses by stock and year for efficient comparisons.

nodes.name: validateMetricRange
nodes.summary: Checks finance metrics against accepted business ranges.

nodes.name: validateYoY
nodes.summary: Compares uploaded records with historical data and flags large year-over-year changes.

nodes.name: warnLargeYoYChange
nodes.summary: Adds a warning when a metric changes beyond the configured year-over-year threshold.

nodes.name: FileValidation.java
nodes.summary: Validates uploaded files before parsing, including presence, emptiness, and expected Excel MIME type.

nodes.name: FileValidation
nodes.summary: File-level upload validator for Excel content-type and empty file checks.

nodes.name: validate
nodes.summary: Runs validation rules for the file, workbook, or business data represented by the method parameters.

nodes.name: StructureValidation.java
nodes.summary: Validates workbook and sheet structure for stock-year upload files, including required metrics, year headers, and numeric cells.

nodes.name: StructureValidation
nodes.summary: Workbook structure validator for required sheets, metric rows, year headers, and numeric values.

nodes.name: validateWorkbook
nodes.summary: Checks workbook-level structure before sheet parsing proceeds.

nodes.name: validateSheet
nodes.summary: Validates sheet layout, required metric rows, year headers, and numeric cells.

nodes.name: readYear
nodes.summary: Parses a year header from a spreadsheet cell.

nodes.name: isNumericLike
nodes.summary: Determines whether a spreadsheet cell can be treated as numeric input.

nodes.name: UploadValidationResult.java
nodes.summary: Accumulates upload validation errors and warnings and supports merging results across validation phases.

nodes.name: UploadValidationResult
nodes.summary: Mutable validation result collector for errors and warnings.

nodes.name: addError
nodes.summary: Adds a validation error issue to the result.

nodes.name: addWarning
nodes.summary: Adds a validation warning issue to the result.

nodes.name: merge
nodes.summary: Combines another validation result into this result.

nodes.name: hasErrors
nodes.summary: Reports whether validation errors have been collected.

nodes.name: hasWarnings
nodes.summary: Reports whether validation warnings have been collected.

nodes.name: getErrors
nodes.summary: Returns collected validation errors.

nodes.name: getWarnings
nodes.summary: Returns collected validation warnings.
